title: Refinitiv News Article
description: Represents a news article or headline from the Refinitiv Data Platform News API, including metadata, content, and classification information.

storyId.description: Unique identifier for the news story.

title.description: The headline text of the news article.

body.description: The full text body of the news article, available when retrieving the complete story.

versionCreated.description: Timestamp when the article was originally created or published.

firstCreated.description: Timestamp of the first version of the story.

sourceCode.description: Code identifying the news source such as NS:RTRS for Reuters.

sourceName.description: Human-readable name of the news source.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code of the article.

urgency.description: The urgency level of the news, with lower values indicating higher urgency.

subjects.description: Subject classification codes for the article.

audiences.description: Target audience codes for the article.

instruments.description: Financial instruments referenced in the article.

newsItem.description: A reference identifier for the news item.
